description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design. The front features four distinct doors, each with a subtle vertical seam and small, round knobs for opening. The central section of the front doors appears to have a slightly different finish, possibly glass or a matte panel, adding visual contrast. The sides and top are finished in a dark wood or laminate, giving the wardrobe a sleek and contemporary appearance. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall construction suggests it is designed for storing clothing or personal items in an urban residential or office setting.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with four front doors, dark wood finish, and subtle contrasting central panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat, light-colored panel with faint vertical seams and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, dark surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing four distinct doors with small round knobs and a central contrasting panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a solid, dark surface and no features.
